reviews.comment:
Malísima experiencia...más de media hora esperando el cambio de turno el 15/03/21 a las 14 hs...cuando llegue había 1 solo camión y a medida que pasaba el tiempo llegaban más vehículos...cuando se decidió el playero GABI atender empezó por el que se le dio la gana de atender así me contesto....IRRESPETUOSO 100 %....seria bueno poner gente para atender que tenga ganas de trabajar...

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience... I waited over half an hour for the shift change on March 15, 2021, at 2 PM... When I arrived, there was only one truck, and as time passed, more vehicles arrived... When the attendant, Gabi, finally decided to attend to customers, he started with whoever he felt like serving. This is what he told me... 100% disrespectful... It would be good to have people working who actually want to do their jobs...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5ODdybkh3EAE
